title: Senior Product Engineer - AI fintech startup
company_focus: AI-powered B2B payments and receivables management
description:
Cherry Ventures is supporting our portfolio with this hire

About the job

Payments might seem slick for consumers, but businesses
still trade with each other manually. Every year, millions
of people work to exchange documents, emails and phone
calls, and send checks and bank transfers worth tens of
trillions of dollars.

Lunos is transforming this sleepy world of B2B payments,
starting with an AI partner that ensures businesses get paid
by managing their receivables just like a human would. Well,
how they would if they worked on it 24/7, never forgot
anything and read every message ever sent to them.

We’re a small team with big ambitions, backed by General
Catalyst & Cherry Ventures who were early backers of
companies like Stripe and Airbnb. We recently raised $5M in
our pre-seed round.

We’re building in a modern stack (TypeScript, Next.js,
Vercel, Supabase/Postgres, Tailwind), blending powerful
agentic AI architectures, curated LLM pipelines,
quantitative methods and robust SaaS foundations.

We’re looking for Senior Product Engineers who:

- Are deeply curious and passionate about building products
  users truly love
- Get frustrated when things don’t move fast enough
- Want their voice to shape product decisions, tech choices,
  and company culture
- Enjoy the freedom and challenge of working across the stack,
  from intuitive UX and robust API design to AI
  architectures and prompt engineering
- Believe AI is fundamentally reshaping the world - and want
  to be part of it

Sound like your kind of adventure?

Let’s talk. 🚀

Salary: $150,000-$220,000 + Equity + Company Performance
Bonus (~10%)

Featured benefits

Medical insurance, 401(k), Vision insurance, Dental
insurance

Requirements added by the job poster

• Authorized to work in the United States

• No need for visa sponsorship

Cherry Ventures is an equal opportunity employer and values
diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race,
religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual
orientation, age, marital status, or disability status.
responsibilities: Build intuitive user interfaces and robust API designs across the full stack
Design and implement agentic AI architectures and LLM pipelines for B2B payment automation
Apply prompt engineering techniques to optimize AI system performance
Shape product decisions, technology choices, and company culture
Work on quantitative methods and robust SaaS foundations
Collaborate with a small team to deliver products users love
use_cases: AI partner that manages B2B receivables like a human would
Automating manual B2B payment processes and document exchange
24/7 monitoring and management of payment messages and communications
Ensuring businesses get paid by tracking and managing receivables
Replacing manual document, email, phone, and check-based B2B trade workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Senior Product Engineer role building an AI
partner that manages B2B receivables using agentic AI
architectures, curated LLM pipelines, and prompt
engineering. The role involves hands-on work with AI
architectures and prompt engineering to build the core AI
product.
